items.title: Gradient perpendicular to level curves
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  level["level curve f equals c"] --> point["point x on curve"]
  point --> grad["gradient nabla f at x"]
  grad --> note["orthogonal to tangent of level curve"]
items.caption: At x on a level set, ∇f(x) points normal to the curve (or surface) where f is constant—toward increasing f.

items.title: Steepest descent update on loss
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  theta["parameters theta"] --> loss["scalar loss L of theta"]
  loss --> backward["compute grad L"]
  backward --> step["theta minus eta times grad L"]
  step --> theta2["updated theta"]
items.caption: Training follows −∇L: move parameters opposite the direction that most increases loss locally.
